baseline_specification.diversified_random: Seeded universe-permutation disjoint blocks maximizing number coverage and minimizing pairwise overlap; POWER second zone seeded coverage-maximizing.
baseline_specification.ordinary_random: N distinct legal tickets sampled uniformly without replacement; POWER second zone uniform 1-8.
baseline_specification.per_draw_union_win_probability_Q: MC-estimated; per-draw union win is iid Bernoulli(Q) by outcome symmetry, so window null = Binomial(support, Q).

db_snapshot.db_open_mode: sqlite3 URI mode=ro + PRAGMA query_only=ON + write-denying authorizer

contract_hash_payload.contract_reset_rule: any family, selector, baseline, seed, hypothesis, or correction change resets the future clock
contract_hash_payload.cutoff_rule: latest committed-ticket target draw per lottery at contract freeze

diversified_random_baseline.description: Seeded universe-permutation disjoint blocks maximizing number coverage and minimizing pairwise overlap; POWER second zone seeded coverage-maximizing.

contract_hash_payload.future_eligibility_rule: only draws strictly after both the cutoff target draw and corrected contract freeze are eligible, and only with prospectively generated committed tickets

hypothesis_family.short_non_promotion_rule: SHORT_50 is integrity / early-warning only and cannot promote.

ordinary_random_baseline.description: N distinct legal tickets sampled uniformly without replacement; POWER second zone uniform 1-8.

primary_hypotheses.claim: A fixed-N strategy portfolio has higher prize-aware union success than both every required equal-N constituent comparator and the maximally-diversified-random equal-N baseline.

rules: within each position, visit source strategies in declared source order
dedupe by canonical ticket fingerprint preserving first occurrence
draw is ineligible when fewer than N distinct tickets remain
never back-fill with random or outcome-aware tickets

frozen_future_contract.cutoff_note: latest committed-ticket target draw per lottery; genuine confirmation requires walk-forward strategy predictions for draws strictly later than the cutoff and after the corrected contract freeze.
frozen_future_contract.future_H0: The observed union advantage is fully explained by ticket count or number coverage.
frozen_future_contract.future_primary_H1: A fixed-N strategy portfolio has higher prize-aware union success than both every required equal-N constituent comparator and the maximally-diversified-random equal-N baseline.

rules: within each position, visit source strategies in declared source order
dedupe by canonical ticket fingerprint preserving first occurrence
draw is ineligible when fewer than N distinct tickets remain
never back-fill with random or outcome-aware tickets

execution_chronology: P276A selected the candidate direction and source strategies after reviewing prior historical P275B outcome evidence.
An initial first-N ticket selector was used in a historical outcome-scoring smoke run.
That run showed CROSS portfolio degeneration to the first source with b/c=0/0.
The selector was then changed to ROUND_ROBIN after those outcomes had been observed.
Final historical results were generated using ROUND_ROBIN and are post-hoc descriptive evidence.
historical_analysis_contract.superseded_identity_only_family_hash_not: This hash covers only the portfolio identity list and is retained for provenance; it is not a historical preregistration hash.

rules: within each position, visit source strategies in declared source order
dedupe by canonical ticket fingerprint preserving first occurrence
draw is ineligible when fewer than N distinct tickets remain
never back-fill with random or outcome-aware tickets

limitations: Retrospective post-hoc bounded evidence only; not confirmatory and not a future-only result; no claim of improved future prediction success.
50-draw (SHORT) windows are integrity guardrails and cannot support promotion.
Tickets are the frozen committed P273A identities; portfolios reuse existing strategy tickets without any refitting.
POWER second-zone-missing rows are excluded as missing eligibility, never imputed or counted as losses.
Per-draw union-win probability Q is treated as constant across draws by combinatorial symmetry of the outcome; the window null is Binomial(support, Q).
No monetary budget, EV, ROI, or betting recommendation is computed.
BIG_LOTTO / POWER_LOTTO portfolios are secondary generalization checks (descriptive only, no promotion verdict).
